_comment: Pin for the IETF draft this codebase implements. Bump slug and known_rev together when a migration PR has actually synchronized dns-aid-core to a new revision or rename. author_person_id is the IETF Datatracker Person ID for the primary draft author this codebase tracks (https://datatracker.ietf.org/api/v1/person/person/137653/) and powers the keyword-based safety-net sweep that catches successor drafts filed without a `replaces` relationship.
